race.comment: LAURA ELIZA (12) looks very well placed having run an encouraging race on debut here on heavy ground, sitting on speed and kicking on gamely for a narrow defeat. Better for that and with even luck from out wide she'll go close. WHERE EAGLES DARE (7) resumes. His fresh run last time in was good and he could surprise here at big odds. ALLUMEUSE (1) is coming along well enough, getting into third at Geelong when last seen. Rates an each-way chance off that. ATELLA MISS (8) has been right there in two runs this time in and maps ideally. Fitter again and expected to run well. FRANK WHISPER (13) first-starter by Frankel out of Sweet Whisper. Has had five hit-outs leading into this, the latest when placing in a Mornington jump-out. Watch the betting.
